VehicleComponentParams.vehicleDescription:
Manufacturer: RSI
Focus: Medical
 
Even in the most remote of planetside destinations, there are people who could use a helping hand. Designed by RSI to cross even the most rugged terrain, the Ursa Medivac features a Tier 3 Medical Bed ideal for offering aid wherever its needed most.
